headlines.description: Bournemouth midfielder Justin Kluivert struck a superb hat trick in a 4-1 away win over Newcastle in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kluivert stars as Bournemouth thrash Newcastle

headlines.description: Substitute Darwin Nunez's stoppage-time double gave Liverpool a 2-0 win at Brentford on Saturday, as the Premier League leaders left it late to record their first league win of 2025.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Núñez double sees Liverpool edge Brentford

headlines.description: Second-half strikes from Emile Smith Rowe and Adama Traore condemned Leicester City to a seventh straight defeat in the Premier League as visiting Fulham won 2-0 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Smith Rowe and Traore strike for Fulham as Leicester lose seventh in a row

events.name: Crystal Palace at West Ham United

headlines.description: Jean-Philippe Mateta scored twice in the second half as Crystal Palace completed a 2-0 Premier League away win at a toothless West Ham United on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mateta double helps Palace win at West Ham

headlines.description: Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins proved a thorn in Arsenal's side again as he completed his side's comeback with the equaliser in a 2-2 draw in the Premier League on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal throw away two-goal lead in draw to Villa
